meta.title: 3-Minutes on Langner's Stuxnet Deep Dive
meta.description: Ralph Langner's Stuxnet Deep Dive was amazing. He walked an audience of 60 experts, plus 60 Minutes, step by step through the Stuxnet PLC code. It is the most downloaded technical ICS video, between its previous hosting location and here. Here is 3-minutes of what was an hour session.
